Central Tokyo seats

[Tokyo](/wiki/Tokyo "Tokyo") currently sends 53 elected members to the [Diet of Japan](/wiki/Diet_of_Japan "Diet of Japan"), 42 to the [House of Representatives](/wiki/House_of_Representatives_(Japan) "House of Representatives (Japan)") and 11 to the [House of Councillors](/wiki/House_of_Councillors_(Japan) "House of Councillors (Japan)").

## House of Representatives

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo%27s_Diet_electoral_districts&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: House of Representatives")]

The current [House of Representatives](/wiki/House_of_Representatives_(Japan) "House of Representatives (Japan)") Tokyo delegation consists of 42 representatives in total. The parties that these members belong to is - 21 members of the [LDP](/wiki/Liberal_Democratic_Party_(Japan) "Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)"), 12 [CDP](/wiki/Constitutional_Democratic_Party_of_Japan "Constitutional Democratic Party of Japan"), 3 [Komeito](/wiki/Komeito "Komeito"), 2 [Ishin](/wiki/Nippon_Ishin_no_Kai "Nippon Ishin no Kai"), 2 [JCP](/wiki/Japanese_Communist_Party "Japanese Communist Party"), 1 [Reiwa](/wiki/Reiwa_Shinsengumi "Reiwa Shinsengumi") and 1 independent.

These delegates are made up of 25 members elected in district seats, and 17 members elected via the proportional representation method.

## House of Councillors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo%27s_Diet_electoral_districts&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: House of Councillors")]

The current [House of Councillors](/wiki/House_of_Councillors_(Japan) "House of Councillors (Japan)") Tokyo delegation consists of 4 members of the [LDP](/wiki/Liberal_Democratic_Party_(Japan) "Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)"), 2 [JCP](/wiki/Japanese_Communist_Party "Japanese Communist Party"), 2 [Komeito](/wiki/Komeito "Komeito"), 1 [CDP](/wiki/Constitutional_Democratic_Party_of_Japan "Constitutional Democratic Party of Japan"), 1 [Ishin](/wiki/Nippon_Ishin_no_Kai "Nippon Ishin no Kai"), and 1 [Reiwa](/wiki/Reiwa_Shinsengumi "Reiwa Shinsengumi").
